calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that it was satisifed with the documents it received from the Decedent's Brother in Japan, that it would do away with the Power of Attorney from the local family Friend and that it would rely on the heirship affidavit provided by Decedent's Brother. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Continued To Aug-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that it was aware of the Brother's position to allow the property to be escheated to State, that the Heirhsip Affidavit was not properly prepared by the purported Brother in Japan, that there was no Power of Attorney and that something was needed to complete the paper trail. In addition, the Court stated that an Apostile and the Power of Attorney that gives Brian Komoto the authority to allow the proceeds to be escheated or assign interest was needed. Mr. Weinkauff stated that he could write another letter. The matter was continued to August 30, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-08-2010 Continued To Apr-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Conservator Mary Ann Warren and the Attorney Steven Weinkauf to show why the powers of the Conservator should not be suspended for failure to appear and for failure to respond to the Examiner's notes dated December 31, 2009. The return date is April 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
